final:
module d_flip_flop(
    input       d     ,
    input       clk   ,
    input       reset ,
    
    output reg  q
);
    
   // D Flip-Flop with asynchronous reset
   always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
       if (reset) begin
           q <= 1'b0;
       end else begin
           q <= d;
       end
   end
     
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
